invariants.invariant: Non-live source only; no active install, old-plugin uninstall, marketplace publish, external service call, or Codex/OMX core modification.
invariants.implementationEvidence: Target path is ../shared/paper-writing-tools-lab/plugin-scaffolds/yxj-paper-os-v2; manifest omits marketplace hooks/mcp/apps and no files were written to active ~/.codex plugin paths.
invariants.testEvidence: validate_plugin.py and validate_scaffold.py passed in verification/20260622T114732Z.

invariants.implementationEvidence: state-contract.md and runtime-execution-contract.md state dispatched/executing/collected/validated are not complete; validator rejects complete without collected+validated+ingested.
invariants.testEvidence: invalid-dispatch-as-complete and invalid-dispatched-timeout-without-output fail expected validators with explicit allowed extras.

invariants.invariant: Preserve compile -> execute -> collect -> validate -> ingest -> state_transition.
invariants.implementationEvidence: runtime-execution-contract.md defines all six stages; task-packet template includes routing, collection, validator, and state-ledger fields.

invariants.invariant: Every direct subagent task declares agent_type, scoped context, expected outputs, collection path, state-ledger path, and validator_refs.
invariants.implementationEvidence: task-packet template and valid fixture include all fields; validate_task_packet enforces them.
invariants.testEvidence: invalid-missing-agent-type fails; direct_execution_invariant_audit checks all required fields.

invariants.invariant: Owner-lane/agent closure is registry-backed and covers approved paper lanes.
invariants.implementationEvidence: agent-lane-registry.yaml defines 30+ lanes including scene-analyst, exemplar-learner, sota-mapper, citation-banker, paper-owner-gate, method-verifier, style-auditor, verifier; agent-contract.md provides lane-to-agent/fallback table; validator derives allowed owner lanes from registry.
invariants.testEvidence: validate_scaffold.py checks required registry lanes and agent-contract coverage; direct_execution_invariant_audit missing=[] for approved lanes.

invariants.invariant: validators vs validator_refs naming is normalized and validator evidence covers every validator_ref.
invariants.source: RALPLAN watch item and runtime validation contract
invariants.implementationEvidence: state-contract.md documents validator_refs canonical alias; validate_yxj_paper_os.py normalizes alias and requires every validator_ref to have passing task/report evidence.
invariants.testEvidence: invalid-missing-validator-definition and invalid-partial-validator-evidence fail; valid fixture proves all refs are covered.

invariants.invariant: PaperSpine and Sisyphus patterns are adapted, not blindly vendored.
invariants.implementationEvidence: source-influences.md maps PaperSpine triplet/citation/motivation/rationale and Sisyphus novelty/reviewer/verifier patterns to yxj-paper-os workspaces and validators.
invariants.testEvidence: validate_scaffold.py resolves local source influence paths ../../tools/PaperSpine and ../../tools/sisyphus-academica.

invariants.invariant: Validators catch the requested false-completion and paper-quality failure modes.
invariants.implementationEvidence: fixtures/invalid contains 16 invalid fixtures with expected_failures and explicit allowed_extra_failures where cascades are intentional.
invariants.testEvidence: run_fixture_suite.py ok=true; unexpected extra failures would fail the suite.
